node.statement: EXACT E5 (Pseudopotential decomposition on sphere): Pi_S*V(Omega_1.Omega_2)*Pi_S = sum_{J=0}^{2S} V_J^{(S)} * P_J(L_1+L_2) where P_J projects onto pair angular momentum J, and V_J^{(S)} are the Haldane pseudopotentials on the sphere. Two-body matrix elements: <m1,m2|V|m3,m4> = sum_J sum_M <S,m1;S,m2|J,M> * V_J^{(S)} * <J,M|S,m3;S,m4> / R, with delta_{m1+m2,m3+m4}. [P01-Haldane p.606; P04-Fano eqs (23)-(24)]
